plan.caption:
The White Flare Elite Trainer Box costs $148 sealed. Crack it open and you are looking at an average return of $67. That is an $82 gap working against you the moment the shrink wrap comes off.

The math at pokeev.com is clear. Nine packs, a booster EV of $7.40 per pack, and three legitimate chase targets in Reshiram ex ($480), Victini ($468), and a second Reshiram ex variant at $212. The ceiling is real. The average is not.

Verdict: KEEP IT SEALED. Sealed price beats open EV by a significant margin, and that spread tends to hold as the set matures.

Would you rip this Elite Trainer Box or hold it? Drop your call below.

Full EV breakdowns for every White Flare product are live at pokeev.com. Link in bio.

brief.eyebrow: WHITE FLARE ETB: RIP OR KEEP?
brief.reason: Opening averages $67. Sealed sits at $148. | The $82 gap makes this ETB a hold, not a rip.
